titleStmt.title: SII 40.283: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 283. (A.R. No. B. 328 of 1933.) Peddamakkena, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a Nandi-pillar set up opposite to the temple of Kōdaṇḍarāmasvāmi.

Gives the eulogy of the king. Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Amarēśvara-Mahādēva by Bhūramādēvi, the wife of the king. The gift was entrusted to Kotedana, son of Pina-Nūkanabōya for supply of ghee to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Atiśayitējarujāta nudita jagatijātana
prasitadharanipraparijātanubhūrāṁbikaṁjatu
lāsyadiśāsu[A]kuma yanu .
Arupamitya yā padadāvaku
jēyuṭasaṁkōṭa
lines are damaged
śrī Amarēśvaradē
vadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhakaparabalasādhakanā
daṁḍapanāyaka śiracchē
da vijayamā vadhūmaṁggaḷasūtraha
raṇa vi daśāyacānūri murā
ṁttaka cētamattamātaṁgasiṁgha
raṭeraḷaka sāmaṁttavēśyābhujaṁgga koṁḍi
ya baṭanaṭanādikā sūtradārapakoṁgga
vīracāḷukya kaṭakasāmaṁttamuṁ kāluva
gaṁḍaragaṁḍa gaṁḍakālānala virōdhi vila
yānala saṁgrāmarāmasamaraika bhīma
kaligalamōgadakai gaṁḍabhēruṁḍa siddhi
cōḍamrigaśārddūla mallacōḍamastaka
śūlanāmādi samasta praśasti sahita
ṁbuna śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kōṭa
gaṁḍaparājulakula satiyaina bhū
ramadēvulu śrī madamarēśvara ma
hādēvarakakhaṁḍavartti dīpaṁbunaki
ccina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni pina
nūkanabōyuni koṭedana putranupautrikamā
caṁdrārkamu nitya māneṁḍu neyi vōyaṁgalavāḍu
Digital edition of SII 40.283 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
